name: SumberYAML SS/SSR 104.17.3.81 fallback patch
features: Inject trusted direct proxy accounts from input/links.txt, input.txt, and links.txt into every output YAML
Scan extra source/cache paths for raw ss:// and ssr:// links
Force server field for SS/SSR proxies to 104.17.3.81 by default
Create manual fallback groups MANUAL-LINK, MANUAL-FALLBACK, and MANUAL-BEST
Prioritize manual/extra-source fallback groups in main selector groups
Avoid OpenClash risky fields: proxy-group timeout/lazy, root tcp-concurrent/unified-delay by default
manual_account_policy: Manual/trusted input links are not tested, filtered, quarantined, removed, or deleted by this patch. SS/SSR server override only rewrites the server field when requested/defaulted.
compatibility_notes: Only valid direct proxy URIs can be inserted into proxies.
HTTP/HTTPS subscription URLs are not inserted directly into proxies.
If an SS/SSR node cannot actually work through 104.17.3.81, YAML remains valid but the node may fail at runtime.
